privacyPolicy.metaDescription: Privacy policy and GDPR compliance information for Dark Kinetic.
privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy

introduction.heading: 1. Introduction
introduction.body: Welcome to the Dark Kinetic Portfolio. We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy will inform you as to how we look after your personal data when you visit our website and tell you about your privacy rights.

dataCollection.heading: 2. Data We Collect
dataCollection.body: We collect analytics and marketing data only after you grant explicit consent. When analytics consent is granted, Google Analytics 4 (GA4) collects anonymized usage data such as pages visited, session duration, and general geographic region. When marketing consent is granted, Meta (Facebook) Pixel collects interaction data to measure ad effectiveness. We do not collect identifying Personally Identifiable Information (PII) through this front-end portfolio.

thirdPartyServices.heading: 3. Third-Party Services
thirdPartyServices.body: This site uses Google Tag Manager to manage analytics and marketing tags. The following third-party services may set cookies when you grant consent: Google Analytics 4 (analytics.google.com) for usage analytics, and Meta Pixel (facebook.com) for marketing measurement. Each service processes data under its own privacy policy. No data is shared with these services until you explicitly grant the corresponding consent category.

gpc.heading: 4. Global Privacy Control (GPC)
gpc.body: We natively respect the Global Privacy Control signal. If your browser supports and injects navigator.globalPrivacyControl, we automatically opt you out of all non-essential scripts and cookies without showing you a disruptive banner.

cookiePolicy.metaDescription: Cookie policy and tracking information for Dark Kinetic.
cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy

whatAreCookies.heading: 1. What Are Cookies?
whatAreCookies.body: Cookies are small text files that are placed on your computer or mobile device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work, or work more efficiently, as well as to provide information to the owners of the site.

howWeUseCookies.heading: 2. How We Use Cookies
howWeUseCookies.body: We use a consent_preferences item in your local storage to remember your cookie choices. When you grant consent, third-party services may set the following cookies:

cookieTable.heading: 3. Cookie Details
cookieTable.analyticsCookies: Analytics cookies (require analytics consent): _ga — Google Analytics client ID, used to distinguish unique users. Retention: 2 years. _ga_* — Google Analytics session identifier. Retention: 2 years. Set by: analytics.google.com.
cookieTable.marketingCookies: Marketing cookies (require marketing consent): _fbp — Meta (Facebook) Pixel browser ID, used to deliver and measure advertisements. Retention: 90 days. _fbc — Meta (Facebook) Pixel click identifier, set when a user arrives via a Facebook ad. Retention: 90 days. Set by: facebook.com.
cookieTable.essentialStorage: Essential storage: consent_preferences — your cookie consent choices, stored in localStorage. No expiration (persists until cleared).

managingPreferences.heading: 4. Managing Your Preferences
managingPreferences.body: If you have enabled Global Privacy Control (GPC) in your browser, your preferences are already strictly managed by your browser and respected by our site. You can change your cookie preferences at any time by clicking "Manage Cookies" in the footer. This will revoke all active consent, clear stored preferences, and reload the page with all non-essential cookies blocked.

legalNotice.metaDescription: Legal notice and ownership information for Dark Kinetic.
legalNotice.title: Legal Notice

ownership.heading: 1. Ownership
ownership.body: This portfolio and its microsites are owned and operated by Héctor Sebastián Trejo Luna. The project is intended for professional showcasing and educational purposes.

intellectualProperty.heading: 2. Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.body: The code for this project is open-source and available on GitHub. However, the personal data, branding assets, and specific content within the Dark Kinetic identity are reserved for professional representation.

disclaimers.heading: 3. Disclaimers
disclaimers.body: The information provided on this site is for general informational purposes only. While we strive for accuracy, we make no warranties about the completeness or reliability of the information.
